description: A grocery store associate is checking for expired items in the dairy section.

nodes.task_description: Visually inspect the 'sell-by' dates on all milk products.

expected_outcome.expected: The associate identifies several cartons that are past their sell-by date.

nodes.task_description: Remove the expired cartons from the shelf.

expected_outcome.expected: The expired product is no longer available for sale.

nodes.task_description: Scan the items and process them as 'waste' or 'shrink' in the inventory system to correctly adjust the on-hand levels.

expected_outcome.expected: The inventory is accurately adjusted to reflect the removal of the expired product.
